title: meconopsis neglecta
intro: Meconopsis neglecta, also known as Himalayan blue poppy, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the poppy family. It is native to the Himalayan region and is known for its vibrant blue flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Meconopsis neglecta can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which have been found to have health benefits including reducing stress and promoting relaxation.
